zh.Ockbrook, Derby, Engl: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾奧可布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Grendon於1155年之前出生在英國德比夏爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特 聖 莫德文時，他的父親Serlo de Grendon20歲，母親Margaret FitzRalph19歲。他於大約1180年與Edelina在英國英格蘭德比夏爾奧可布盧可結婚。他去世於1203年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾艾吉頓，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯坦利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Grendon于1155年之前出生在英国德比夏爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特 聖 莫德文时，他的父亲Serlo de Grendon20岁，母亲Margaret FitzRalph19岁。他于大约1180年与Edelina在英国英格兰德比夏爾奧可布盧可结婚。他去世于1203年在英国英格兰德比夏爾艾吉頓，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯坦利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Grendon was born before 1155, in Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England, his father, Serlo de Grendon, was 20 and his mother, Margaret FitzRalph, was 19. He married Edelina about 1180, in Ockbrook, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1203, in Egginton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Stanley, Derbyshire, England.

fr.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Grendon est né avant 1155, à Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Serlo de Grendon, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzRalph, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Edelina environ 1180, à Ockbrook, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1203, à Egginton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Stanley, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Grendon vor 1155 in Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Serlo de Grendon 20 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzRalph 19. Er hat um 1180 in Ockbrook, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Edelina geheiratet. Er starb 1203 in Egginton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stanley, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Grendon è nato il prima del 1155 nel Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Serlo de Grendon, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzRalph, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Edelina circa 1180, nel Ockbrook, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1203, nel Egginton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Stanley, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Grendonが1155年以前にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブルトン ウプオン トレント スト モドウンで生まれた時，父Serlo de Grendonは20歳，母Margaret FitzRalphは19歳であった。約1180年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアオクブルークでEdelinaと結婚した。彼は1203年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアエグジントンで死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアスタンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: William de Grendon(이)가 1155년 이전 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Serlo de Grendon(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzRalph(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 옥k브룩에서 Edelina(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 긴턴에서 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 스탠리에 묻혔다.

pt.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Grendon nasceu antes 1155, em Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Serlo de Grendon, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzRalph, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Edelina aproximadamente 1180, em Ockbrook, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1203, em Egginton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Stanley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Grendon родился перед 1155 г. в местности буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Serlo de Grendon было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzRalph, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Edelina около 1180 г. в местности оккбрук, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1203 г. в местности эгинтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности стэнли, дирбишир, Англия.

Se casó con Edelina aproximadamente 1180, en Ockbrook, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1203, en Egginton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Stanley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
